items.title: [负面] 什么叫一个角色全新的顶配是硬性要求抽16只？特么往+12塞拆分新的机制+专属对话+算是稀缺的资源，以...
items.summary:
什么叫一个角色全新的顶配是硬性要求抽16只？特么往+12塞拆分新的机制+专属对话+算是稀缺的资源，以前有的角色非要+4手感才能比较舒服我忍了，+12一般要么氪佬，要么纯对角色的厨力。抽数给的还行，稍微屯一段时间资源咬咬牙还是能博一下非0启的的。现在最终法则非要顶配才能拿，除了恶心到非个个顶配的氪金选手和角色厨子还能干啥？毫不怀疑🗡🐱以后会把主推角色一些能直接改变地位的机制塞进+12，比如给纯输出角色+12放个大量提升甚至可以影响队伍整体的的拐力、给辅助角色+12放个拐力可以给到别的方向比如什么临时转永久，角色的缺陷一定要满配才能补齐。

之前周年拿抽数赶主线，星辰篇34被子一掀全是好几层死扛的怪甚至boss，对面每个小怪一巴掌抽我100+每回合我平均得挨四五巴掌我都咬咬牙抬神国队打了。结果人家数值膨胀，膨胀的是新角色，老角色一般是发加强往活动剧情加戏份。你手里老角色要跟上膨胀得直接抽满配啊？那🗡🐱你要不发大伙点道具直接资源返还让大家练新角色去吧

4.17二编：带着你的限定抽变限时抽滚😠
4.17晚三编：msgxm你看着自己端上来的全员+12不会笑吗

items.title: [正面] The core gameplay is solid. You form teams of 4 ch...
items.summary:
The core gameplay is solid. You form teams of 4 characters, head into scenarios that each consists of about 4-8 battles, strategically picking up artefacts, boosting cards with new traits, and awakening some of those characters. There are also boss battles in which you are given a specific set of artefacts in the beginning and have to allocate resources to awaken characters in-battle. 

But what really stands out to me is that this game is very user-friendly for a gacha. You typically can collect all your daily rewards from different activities with a few clicks and very little loading / waiting. The resources / currencies you receive by playing are plentiful enough for you to make real progress. PvP is optional. Most UIs are very considerate - for instance you do not get locked in upgrade popups and become unable to view your current artefacts, card upgrades or whatnot. Only some of the gamemodes require "stamina" to play; you can store stamina above the softcap. 

That being said, I don't play very often. A lot of the play-hours are afk time, and I enjoy playing slowly instead of rushing for new contents. I faintly remember reading about the later content being more unbalanced or difficult for F2P players. But so far I think this game is enjoyable.

items.title: [正面] Es un gacha muy generoso con muy buen arte , buena...
items.summary: Es un gacha muy generoso con muy buen arte , buena música y una historia muy interesante

items.title: [正面] 100+ hours in like a month, this game is so fun to...
items.summary: 100+ hours in like a month, this game is so fun to me, I've been wanting to play a gacha that I'd actually enjoy. I think you should try it if you want to get into a gacha game and like slay the spire
